title: olotrema gynobasis
intro: Olotrema gynobasis, also known as gynobasis, is a type of plant in the family Saururaceae, which is native to China and Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of gynobasis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections. Gynobasis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for oral consumption, or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
